---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or enhancement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who feels it? (solo founder / product engineer
/ DX practitioner / other — pick one.)

## Proposed solution

What you'd like the library to do. Concrete example if possible:

```python
# How you'd like to use it
```

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why they're worse.

## Audience segment

- [ ] Solo founder (pre-PMF)
- [ ] Product engineer / PM
- [ ] DX practitioner / platform lead
- [ ] Other (explain)

## Willingness to contribute

- [ ] I could submit a PR for this
- [ ] I could help test a PR
- [ ] Neither — just reporting the need

## Additional context

Links to related issues, competing libraries, or relevant docs.
